Resources

Co-ops & Land

guide

Community Land Trust Network

How-to guides and legal resources for establishing community land trusts to permanently decommodify housing.

housingland-trustcommunity-ownership
guide

Democracy Collaborative

Research and resources on community wealth building, worker cooperatives, and local democratic economies.

cooperativescommunity-wealtheconomics
tool

USFWC: Worker Co-op Resources

US Federation of Worker Cooperatives — templates, legal guides, and toolkits for starting or converting to a worker co-op.

cooperativesworker-ownedlegal

Digital Sovereignty

guide

EFF: Surveillance Self-Defense

Electronic Frontier Foundation's step-by-step guides on digital security for activists, journalists, and everyday people.

securityprivacysurveillance
guide

Security in a Box

Digital security tools and tactics for human rights defenders — covers encryption, secure comms, and safe browsing.

securityprivacyencryption
tool

FOSS Alternatives (AlternativeTo)

Searchable directory of free and open-source alternatives to proprietary software.

fosssoftwareprivacy
tool

Access Now: Digital Security Helpline

Free direct digital security assistance for civil society, activists, and journalists under threat.

securityemergencysupport
tool

Distributed Press

Tools and guides for publishing to the decentralized web — IPFS, Hypercore, and community archiving.

decentralizedipfspublishingarchiving

Legal & Rights

guide

Tenants Together (California)

Tenant rights resources, guides on rent control, eviction defense, and how to organize your building.

housingtenant-rightsorganizing
tool

National Bail Fund Network

Directory of community bail funds across the US. Find a fund in your area or learn how to start one.

bailcriminal-justicedirectory
guide

Know Your Rights (ACLU)

Plain-language guides on your rights during protests, police encounters, at borders, and in the workplace.

rightspoliceprotestimmigration
guide

Workerscenter.org Resources

National Employment Law Project's guides on minimum wage, overtime, misclassification, and worker rights.

laborworker-rightswages
guide

Law for Black Lives

Legal resources, know-your-rights guides, and movement lawyering tools centering Black liberation.

rightsracepoliceprotest

Municipal & Policy

guide

Local Progress

Network of progressive local elected officials with policy guides on housing, policing, and economic development.

local-governmentpolicyhousing
guide

Participatory Budgeting Project

Resources for running participatory budgeting processes in cities and communities.

participatory-budgetingdemocracylocal

Organizing

guide

Beautiful Trouble: A Toolbox for Revolution

Practical guide to creative activism and direct action — tactics, principles, and case studies from movements worldwide.

direct-actiontacticscreativity
guide

Seeds for Change: Organizing Guides

Free guides on consensus decision-making, facilitation, campaign strategy, and group dynamics.

consensusfacilitationstrategy
guide

Organizing for Power (Labor Notes)

Practical resources for building power in your workplace — one-on-ones, mapping, committee structure, contract campaigns.

laborworkplaceunions
tool

Midwest Academy Strategy Chart

A foundational campaign planning tool — goals, constituents, targets, tactics, and resources on one page.

strategycampaignplanning
guide

Training for Change

Free workshop tools, facilitation guides, and training curricula for social change organizers.

facilitationworkshopstraining
archive

Highlander Research and Education Center

Resources from one of the oldest popular education centers in the US, rooted in the civil rights and labor movements.

popular-educationhistorycivil-rights
book

Mutual Aid: Building Solidarity During This Crisis (and the Next)

Dean Spade's primer on mutual aid as a political practice — what it is, how it works, and how to start.

mutual-aidsolidaritytheory

Theory & History

archive

Marxists Internet Archive

The world's largest free archive of Marxist, anarchist, and socialist writing — thousands of texts searchable online.

marxismtheoryhistoryanarchism
archive

Anarchist Library

Massive archive of anarchist and anti-authoritarian texts, manifestos, and essays in many languages.

anarchismtheoryhistory
archive

Libcom Library

Articles and books on labor history, class struggle, and libertarian communism.

labor-historycommunismclass
book

Haymarket Books

Radical, independent publisher with free excerpts and low-cost ebooks on movement history and theory.

publishingmovement-historytheory
